title: Extraction Method A (FMS and CR)
author: Faezah Mohd Salleh
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.im7cc9n
materials: Digestion of ca. 25 mg sample with Buffer ATL (Qiagen, Hilden, DE) and Proteinase K overnight at 56 °C. undetermined, Sample Incubation was performed on a thermomixer with 800 rpm
DNA purification following manufacturer's protocol with Buffer AW1 and Buffer AW2 (Qiagen, Hilden, DE).

steps.title: After pelleting remaining material, remove supernatant...
steps.instruction: After pelleting remaining material, remove supernatant and added to Buffer AL and ethanol.

steps.title: Transfer the solution to DNeasy Mini...
steps.instruction: Transfer the solution to DNeasy Mini spin column (Qiagen, Hilden, DE) and centrifuge at 8000 rpm.

steps.title: Prior to elution, incubate DNA in...
steps.instruction: Prior to elution, incubate DNA in the membrane with elution Buffer AE for 5 min at room temperature. 00:05:00, Incubation at RT

steps.title: Elution proceeds by centrifugation at 8000 rpm for 1 min
steps.instruction: Elution proceeds by centrifugation at 8000 rpm for 1 min. 00:01:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Measure DNA concentration on Nanodrop (Thermo Fischer Scientific, Darmstadt, DE)
steps.instruction: Measure DNA concentration on Nanodrop (Thermo Fischer Scientific, Darmstadt, DE).
